results.title: Microsoft Q2 FY2026 Earnings: Revenue $69.6 Billion, Azure Growth Accelerates to 33%
results.snippet: Microsoft reported Q2 FY2026 revenue of $69.6 billion, up 12% year-over-year. Azure and other cloud services grew 33%, accelerating from 31% in Q1, driven by AI workloads. Copilot AI assistant has reached 85 million monthly active users across Microsoft 365. Operating income was $31.7 billion with an operating margin of 45.5%.

results.title: Microsoft Copilot Passes 85 Million Users; Enterprise AI Adoption Accelerates
results.snippet: Microsoft's AI-powered Copilot assistant has surpassed 85 million monthly active users, up from 50 million six months earlier. More than 70% of Fortune 500 companies now use Copilot. CEO Satya Nadella described AI as 'the defining technology of our era' and said Microsoft is deploying AI across every product. Copilot contributed an estimated $5 billion in incremental annual revenue.

results.title: Microsoft LinkedIn Revenue Grows 10% to $4.4 Billion; Cloud Segment Drives Profits
results.snippet: Microsoft's Intelligent Cloud segment, which includes Azure, generated $25.5 billion in Q2 FY2026 (+21% YoY). Productivity and Business Processes revenue reached $29.4 billion (+12%), including Microsoft 365 Commercial and LinkedIn. More Personal Computing was $14.7 billion (+4%). LinkedIn revenue grew 10% to $4.4 billion, reflecting strong hiring activity and premium subscription growth.
